Surname.jp: 他国の人見知りな死霊術師

description.en: Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to reduce the targets' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 2인을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵2体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击2名敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks 2 enemies, and has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from the target.\nIf the target is Earth element, inflicts reduced <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 2인을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color>의 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2개</color> 해제합니다.\n대상이 지속성이라면 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵2体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2個</color>解除する。\n対象が地属性の場合、<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击2名敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>的几率解除目标的<color=#28d9ed>2个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。\n若目标为土属性,则<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to decrease all enemies' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2</color> turn(s).\nAdditionally, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unhealable</color> on Earth enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2</color> turn(s).
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 감소시킵니다.\n추가로 지속성 대상에게는 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>회복 불가</color>를 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体に攻撃し、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2</color>ターンの間DOWNさせる。\nさらに、地属性の敵に対しては<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>回復不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2</color>ターン付与。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>概率使全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>与<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2</color>回合。\n另外,对土属性目标有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>概率施加<color=#28d9ed>无法恢复</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2</color>回合。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nGrants an <color=#28d9ed>Extra Turn</color> upon using <color=#28d9ed>Can't Live Forever</color>.\n<color=#28d9ed>Eternal</color> permanently gains un-dispellable <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness Up</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Penetration Up</color> at the start of battle, but her own <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> is greatly reduced.
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
<color=#28d9ed>영원히 살 수는 없어</color> 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>추가 턴</color>을 획득합니다.

<color=#28d9ed>이터널</color>은 전투 입장 시 해제 불가능한 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중 증가, 관통 증가</color>를 영구적으로 보유하는 대신, 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 크게 감소합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n<color=#28d9ed>『永遠には生きられない』</color>使用時、<color>#28d9ed>追加ターン</color>を獲得する。\n<color=#28d9ed>【エターナル】</color>は戦闘開始時に解除不可の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中UP</color>と<color=#28d9ed>貫通UP</color>を永続で得る代わりに、自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が大幅にDOWNする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n使用<color=#28d9ed>「不能永生」</color>时,获得<color=#28d9ed>追加回合</color>。\n<color=#28d9ed>「永恒」</color>在战斗开始时永久获得不可驱散的<color=#28d9ed>效果命中提升</color>与<color=#28d9ed>穿透提升</color>,但自身<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>将大幅降低。
